hv_end_prayers_0.title: Silence of the Heavens
hv_end_prayers_0.body: No more prayers rise to you. The temples empty, the altars grow cold, and even the desperate ask for nothing anymore.

hv_end_prayers_100.title: Flood of Prayers
hv_end_prayers_100.body: The whole world calls to you every second. Requests rise in waves, voices overlap, and the pleas never stop. You reign over a kneeling humanity... yet one that is never satisfied.

hv_end_cults_0.title: World Without Churches
hv_end_cults_0.body: The priests have vanished, the processions have stopped, and sacred symbols become old forgotten ornaments. Your name still exists in a few books... but no longer in hearts.

hv_end_cults_100.title: Total Religion
hv_end_cults_100.body: Every street has its altar, every house its doctrine, every child its oath. The world devotes everything to you... until it no longer knows how to live without worshipping you.

hv_end_interventions_0.title: Absent God
hv_end_interventions_0.body: You no longer intervene. Storms strike, empires fall, the innocent weep... and the sky remains silent. Your greatness may still endure, but no one sees it as a presence anymore.

hv_end_interventions_100.title: Hand Upon the World
hv_end_interventions_100.body: You are everywhere. In harvests, wars, births, and the fall of kings. Every destiny bears your mark. Humans still live... but nothing truly belongs to them anymore.

hv_end_free_will_0.title: Puppets of Light
hv_end_free_will_0.body: You have guided humankind so much that they no longer know how to choose on their own. Good may reign... but without soul, without doubt, without freedom. A perfect world, frozen in your will.

hv_end_free_will_100.title: Human Revolt
hv_end_free_will_100.body: They thank you less, listen to you less, and eventually begin to challenge you. You gave them so much freedom... that they learn to live without you.
